productDisplayName: Inkfruit Men's We Not Just Living Tomato Red T-shirt
description: CompositionTomato red round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with red fabric tape on the inseam of the necklne and graphic print with lettering  on the front FittingComfortWash care Hand wash separately in cool water at 30 degrees Do not scrub Do not bleach Turn inside out and dry flat in shade Warm iron on reverse Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Do you get the feeling that people are not living life to the fullest, and merely wasting it? That means this tomato red tee from inkfruit belongs to you. Let people know that life is too precious to be wasted, and it's about time they sit up and take charge of it, doing something fruitful. Pair it with jeans or shorts and spread the good word around, as you make every moment of your own life count.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
